title: meibomia tenuifolia
intro: Meibomia tenuifolia, also known as Butterfly Weed, is a flowering plant native to North America. It is a perennial legume with clusters of small, orange or yellow flowers that attract butterflies and other pollinators. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Meibomia tenuifolia is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving anxiety and stress, and supporting immune function.
